---
title: "The Rev. Godfrey Bolles Lee"
---

## The Rev. Godfrey Bolles Lee

**Dates:** (1817-1903)

### Description

Warden of Winchester College 1861-1903.

### Biography

His obituary in <i>The Times</i> (31 January 1903), 8, notes that he died on the same day as the Rev. James Edwards Sewell, Warden of New College, and that he had married a Miss Crawford, daughter of a Winchester doctor, who predeceased him.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 1 [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
